title: BEM-568 Claude token smoke
objective: Create safe smoke-test for CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN without printing token value. Create .github/workflows/claude-token-smoke.yml with workflow_dispatch only. It must set env CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN from secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, check only non-empty/empty, write governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md and governance/transport/results.jsonl record with status secret_present or secret_missing, commit result, no issue comments, never echo token value. Also create proof. No issue comments.
